blocks.content: Shirone had a blank expression.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's not an illusion.
Even his current thoughts seemed to flow backward, as if time were reversed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh? Huh?
After a moment of confusion, Shirone quickly assessed his state with a clear mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Come to think of it…
His thoughts were the opposite when experiencing the multiverse and being in the outside world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Thoughts reverse based on inside and outside. In other words…
Time flows backward.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hmm.
Deep in thought, Shirone moved straight through the undefined space.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I am walking forward. But is that true?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What if I'm actually walking backward, and time is flowing in reverse?
Let's conduct a thought experiment.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If you record someone walking forward and play the video backward, what happens?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The movement will look awkward.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But the reason it looks awkward is because we're used to our time. If time itself flowed backward…
Shirone walking forward would look awkward instead.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I get it.
Shirone took a deep breath.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The reason time reverses.
This world is made of two signals, photons and quantum particles combined.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: That's the eye. An eye looking from inside out and an eye looking from outside in. Depending on that perspective… time's direction reverses.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For example.
Shirone thought of a puppet.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A puppet is connected by strings, with a control stick above its head. The puppet believes it can move on its own.
At least it believes so.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The control stick moves. The puppet raises its right arm. Now, here's the question.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The puppet thinks it raised its right arm, causing the control stick to move.
This is how humans perceive the world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: To put it more intuitively… I dug the ground, so the ground should be dug.
In other words, the puppet raising its arm is the cause, and the control stick moving is the effect.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: From the outside world's perspective…
The control stick moving is the cause, and the puppet raising its right arm is the effect.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It changes based on perspective. So cause and effect completely reverse…
And so does the thought system.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The sense of receiving time also reverses.
Shirone shivered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: For God…
Time flows backward.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ikael's words to me. Bedium's last will. That's what they meant.
It's narrowing down.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: God is time. So how does that God's thought process work?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is a result for us is a cause for them.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I marry her because I love her. That's human thinking. But…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: God would say: I marry her. Because I will love her.
Such reversal.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can use magic. Because I will learn magic. I became the world's greatest swordsman. Because I will work hard enough. I went to prison. Because I will become a murderer.
A reversal where results humans must achieve through countless wills are achieved from the start.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What is God?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The end of all time.
A result.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: God is a result for us.
Expanding this thought can infer what the outside world in reality is…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Knowing all history, Omega. If you reverse the world from God's perspective…
Civilizations decline, life disappears, the universe shrinks, and finally reaches that point.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There will be a moment when the beginning starts. And applying God's perspective there…
Shirone bit his lip.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There is another universe with negative time.
The outside world.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A universe was born through some amplification. But that universe wasn't one, it was two.
If there are two directions of time, there must be two universes as well.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And that universe has reversed causality. Based on this inference…
He was devastated by a terrible truth.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The final point of our world, this place's result, becomes the beginning in the outside world.
Why is that dangerous?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Humankind will eventually conquer space.
When humans reach the same position as their creator, having mastered everything that exists, they become gods.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: And paradoxically, that god exists at the moment of negative universe's birth.
What kind of god?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What do we ultimately become?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Machines.
Like High Gear, at the pinnacle of mechanical civilization without lifespan, aging, or disease…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: A program.
Sent by administrators from the outside world, moving by their mission…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why are administrators needed? Though just a hypothesis now, their judgment made sense strangely enough.
Because they see from God's perspective.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: There are two universes. The problem is, the outside world's universe knew everything from the start.
Because they started as gods.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But in that world, God is heading towards extinction.
Becoming human, becoming life, becoming matter, and eventually meeting an end.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Even God can't stop time. God is time. So what choice does God make?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Control the outcome of the world we live in.
Multiverse.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Never reach the final outcome, spreading this world like bubbles.
A diagram of the entire universe formed in his mind.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In the beginning, there was light.
The universe spread out from that light, with time running both positively and negatively.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: One side follows human causality. The other follows divine causality.
In the coordinates where human causality applies, infinite universes bubble like foam.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: In other words, God manages this place. And as long as those bubbles don't disappear and are maintained…
The God on the other side is eternal.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Without being downgraded to human, it extends endlessly. Ultimately controlling our causality.
What grudge would God hold?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Cold calculation. Logical judgment. After all, God is… our final form.
Shirone took a deep breath.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I found it, Gaold. Where God is.
But he couldn't meet Him.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: To meet God, one must leave reality for the outside world. Now I understand why we shouldn't approach the outside world. Why Argones activates.
Because it's an act of killing God.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Has Nane already met Him? Probably. But if he hasn't come… - Am I Nane who swallowed Anke Ra's dream? Or Anke Ra who swallowed Nane's dream?
Shirone shook his head.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Enough idle thoughts. I'll think about it outside. First, let's return to the original world.
Now he had a rough idea of how.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can reverse it.
If time has a negative direction, the mind can also become a signal that reverses.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Using God's perspective, God's thought.
Reverse causality.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huuu!
It was a task of twisting the standards of the world and the essence of humanity, but Shirone was Yahweh.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I can do it. If it were impossible, I wouldn't have realized the reversal of thought here.
He started with the smallest things.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I exist.
From there, countless thoughts began to reverse as if time were being rewound.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh!
It was a grand task that shattered the 5-dimensional multi-cube, the foundation of Shirone's knowledge.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I will return.
To the place where his loved ones are.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I will go.
As his mind gradually reversed, light began to seep into the undefined space.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: His head felt like it was splitting.
Aaah!
Darkness fell like shards, and light suddenly burst in through the gaps with rough force.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Reversal of causality.
Shirone recalled when he entered the Taiji while fighting Giyorgi.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Goffin's message." - They are watching you. Trust no one. Save yourself from the terrible truth.
So that's what it was.
In the perfectly reversed 5-dimensional multi-cube, Shirone defined God's thought as this: Ouroboros.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: We won! We did it!
As Dr. Martin's machine crashed to the ground, users cheered.

blocks.speaker: User
blocks.content: This means no end of service, right? I almost lost all my parts.

blocks.speaker: User
blocks.content: Are parts important? This is our base. What fun is life without High Gear?
As East and West Country users chatted amicably, some remained silent.

blocks.speaker: User
blocks.content: Yahweh.
They were users who had exchanged hearts with Shirone in the world of High Gear.
The Operator looked up at the sky.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Where did he go?
Abnormally exiting the world of High Gear wasn't unrelated to reality.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: The situation is quite serious. Even if he exited, I thought it was reality, but he hasn't woken up.
Golden Wheel's subordinates confirmed that Shirone was still asleep.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: It's okay.
Uorin's voice trembled.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: He'll come back. That's the kind of person he is. He can't abandon this world no matter what.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: What if he doesn't come back?
She had never thought about what she would do in a world without Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: I'd probably be angry.
Her voice was calm, but Little Witch's face was twisted.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: After that, I don't know.
Making expressions with a mechanical face meant the signal itself was distorted.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Hey, look!
Destroyer707 pointed to the sky.
Everyone looked up, and the Operator's shoulders began to tremble.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Ah…
The sky seemed to swirl and then revealed a familiar machine.

blocks.speaker: Destroyer707
blocks.content: Yahweh!
As if gravity had collapsed, a hole opened in the sky, and light surged from the ground.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Huh? He's back?
As Fermi spoke, Uorin dashed forward.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Aaah!
What was I trying to do?

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Yes, I only need you. It's okay if you don't love me. Just stay in this world.
Compared to the despair she felt when Yahweh disappeared, the current situation was a blessing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'm back.
Even if it was no different from countless other illusions, his heart clearly shouted that this was the place.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Here! Here!
And just as she was about to throw herself, the Operator ran from the side and hugged Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Hey…
Uorin stopped, and the users looked at her in surprise.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: You idiot!
The Operator shouted.

blocks.speaker: Operator
blocks.content: Why are you so reckless? What's Dr. Martin compared to that? High Gear can be rebuilt. But if something happened to you…
There would be nowhere left to go.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sorry. But I came back like this.
Destroyer707's team and users rushed over.

blocks.speaker: User
blocks.content: It was amazing. This Solar War was the best experience of my life! Thanks to you!

blocks.speaker: User
blocks.content: Shall we contact each other outside? Oh, you're human, right? I'll give you my address…
Fermi placed a hand on Uorin's shoulder.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Don't be too disheartened. It's not love. Though who knows what the future holds.

blocks.speaker: Uorin
blocks.content: Hmph, what do you take me for? Ten thousand years is nothing. Do you think I'd be shaken by one kid?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: True.
Fermi was also satisfied with the outcome, and Shirone, leading the users, said.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go back.
To the world we live in.
